hero.badgeLine: AI applied to structural analysis from Revit → FEM
hero.subtitle: Our AI platform automates validations and model reviews, launches structural calculation pipelines, and returns traceable results into your BIM workflow in minutes.
hero.pill3: AI for QA, code checks, and optimization
hero.ledBy: A project led by Laura Palacio, Civil Engineer and structural analysis expert

value.title: Built for teams that actually calculate
value.subtitle: From the BIM model to the final report—with automation, control, and traceability.

features.title: Connect Revit
features.desc: Reads the BIM model, detects changes, and prepares structural information automatically.

features.title: Analytical model
features.desc: Generates nodes, members, supports, loads, topology, and structural properties.

features.title: Analyze & design
features.desc: Runs analysis, combines loads, and prepares code-based verifications.

features.title: AI that understands structures
features.desc: Detects inconsistencies, highlights issues, and helps you review with technical context.

features.title: Sync results
features.desc: Returns forces, deflected shapes, utilization ratios, and reports to the BIM environment.

features.title: Automated reports
features.desc: Produces clear deliverables for review, validation, or client presentations.

process.title: From BIM to results in 5 steps

steps.title: Upload or connect Revit
steps.desc: Versioning and control of the structural model.

steps.title: AI validation
steps.desc: Automated review, QA, and issue detection.

steps.title: FEM model
steps.desc: Technical conversion, loads, combinations, and analysis setup.

steps.title: Results in your BIM
steps.desc: Visualization, reports, traceability, and faster decisions.

capabilities.title: Built for teams that actually analyze structures
capabilities.subtitle: Concrete capabilities for modeling, validating, analyzing, and documenting—without losing the technical thread.

showcase.title: A technical cockpit for every revision
showcase.subtitle: Review forces, deflections, incidents, combinations, and analysis status in one interface.

cases.title: Designed for everyday and non-standard structures
cases.subtitle: Use cases where automation and technical control make a difference on every delivery.

items.title: Concrete buildings
items.desc: Automate BIM-to-analysis handoff, reduce inconsistencies, and speed up reviews.

items.title: Steel structures
items.desc: Track members, connections, loads, and results with stronger traceability.

items.title: Project revisions
items.desc: Compare versions, assess change impact, and avoid blind re-analysis.

items.title: BIM + analysis teams
items.desc: Keep modeling and analysis aligned without endless manual exports.

items.title: Engineering offices
items.desc: Improve delivery times, standardize reviews, and professionalize the analysis workflow.

items.title: Engineers + Architects
items.desc: Our team has built STRUXAI with strong experience in residential structures and building compliance.

dashboardCta.body: STRUXAI is the copilot your structural team needed: it unifies model, analysis, and reports without losing technical rigor.
